title: TAPPaaS Module Catalog Schema
description: Field schema for module-catalog.json (the per-repo TAPPaaS module registry; renamed from modules.json per #305). Defines the structure used for VMID allocation, catalog browsing, taxonomy and tooling. Every 'managed: full' repo carries a module-catalog.json validated against this schema.

catalogEntry.description: A user-facing catalog module (foundation or application). Carries the full taxonomy (stack, category, status) for catalog-driven tooling and UI.

moduleName.description: Unique module identifier. Matches vmname in the module's JSON.

repo.description: Source repository tier. foundation=TAPPaaS core, application=TAPPaaS apps, community=Community repo.

moduleJson.description: Relative path from repo root to the module's JSON declaration file.

vmid.description: Proxmox VM ID, unique across catalog entries in this repo. Use null (or 0) for modules with no dedicated VM — e.g. policy-only firewall modules, or a service that shares a node.

stack.description: Deployment stack. Groups modules by functional domain for catalog browsing.

category.description: Category within the stack. Free-form lowercase string.

status.description: Single source of truth for module readiness. stable=production-ready; beta=usable, under active development; incomplete=not yet functional; deprecated=scheduled for removal.

simpleEntry.description: A non-user-facing catalog entry (VM template or test fixture). VMID-register only — no taxonomy required.

moduleName.description: Unique identifier for the template or test fixture.

moduleJson.description: Relative path from repo root to the entry's JSON declaration file.

vmid.description: Proxmox VM ID. Must be unique across all catalog entries in this repo.
